Caps..Back, coldness: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches. Coldness of the whole body.
Caps..Back, coldness, dorsal region: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
Caps..Back, coldness, dorsal region, scapulae: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
Caps..Back, coldness, dorsal region, scapulae,: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
Caps..Bladder: Violent tenesmus in rectum, and bladder at the same time. Tenesmus of the bladder; strangury. Burning, biting pain after urination, in old cases of gonorrhoea, in which there no reaction.
Caps..Chill: When the chill begins there is thirst. Thirst after every dysenteric stool, a sudden carving for ice-cold water, which causes chilliness. Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill; it feels cold in the stomach.
Caps..Extremities: In gouty constitutions, with cracking of the joints and gouty deposits in the joints, stiff joints, clumsy, weak, give out soon. Every cough jars the affected joint.
Caps..Generalities: These constitutions react slowly after diseases and do not respond to remedies, a sluggish state, a tired, lazy constitution. There is sluggishness of the whole economy. They are chilly patients, are sensitive to air, and what to be in a warm room. Even in the ordinary weather the open air causes chilliness. They are sensitive to cold and to bathing.
Caps..Head: Headaches as if the skull would split when moving the head, when walking or coughing. Feeling as if the head would fly to pieces; holds the head with the hand. Feeling as if the head were large, aggravated by coughing and stepping, ameliorated by lying with the head high.
Caps..Mind: In the mental state there is no more striking thing than this symptom: homesickness. A sickness like homesickness runs through the remedy and is accompanied by red cheeks and sleeplessness, hot feeling in the fauces, fearfulness. They are oversensitive to impressions, are always looking for an offence or slight; always suspicious and looking for an insult.
Caps..Mind, irritability: Obstinate to the extreme; it is a devilishness. Even if she wants a certain thing she will oppose it if is proposed by some one else.
Caps..Mouth: On the tongue and lips, flat, sensitive, spreading ulcers with lardaceous base. Taste foul like putrid water. When coughing the air from the lungs causes a pungent offensive taste in the mouth. A hot pungent air comes up from the throat, tasting foul when coughing.
Caps..Rectum: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Violent tenesmus in rectum, and bladder at the same time. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
Caps..Rectum, pain: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
Caps..Rectum, pain, burning: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
Caps..Respiration: It is useful in perplexing and troublesome chronic hoarseness. He had had a cold and remedies for the acute condition have been given, perhaps two or three remedies, Acon., Bry., Hep., Phos., but all at once you wake up to the fact of his chronic constitutional state of hoarseness. He is rotund, chilly, red faced, and the hoarseness disappears under Capsicum.
Caps..Skin: The skin all over is red and burning, a capillary congestion. The skin is moist and cold, and there is a fine measly condition of the skin due to capillary congestion.
Caps..Sleep: A sickness like homesickness runs through the remedy and is accompanied by red cheeks and sleeplessness, hot feeling in the fauces, fearfulness.
Caps..Stomach: Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill; it feels cold in the stomach.
Caps..Stomach, pain: it feels cold in the stomach.
Caps..Stomach, pain, burning: Burning soreness with ulceration in the fauces.
Caps..Stomach, thirst: When the chill begins there is thirst. Thirst after every dysenteric stool, a sudden carving for ice-cold water, which causes chilliness. Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill.
Caps..Abdomen, pain: Dysentery. After stool, tenesmus and thirst, and drinking causes shuddering.
Caps..Generalities, pain: Stitches in the suffering part with the cough. Every cough jars the affected joint.
Caps..Appetite: He desires something warm, something stimulating, craves pungent things. This is seen in whisky drinkers; they crave pepper, and the pepper, on the other hand, turns round and craves whisky. These diffusable stimulants crave some stimulating thing, crave support. Dipsomania.
Caps..Appetite, desires: He desires something warm, something stimulating, craves pungent things. This is seen in whisky drinkers; they crave pepper, and the pepper, on the other hand, turns round and craves whisky. These diffusable stimulants crave some stimulating thing, crave support.
